description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Deleting an object protected from accidental deletion now offers to remove the protection and delete it, on User, Computer, and Group Management and in AD Cleanup.
- Browse OU/Group/User now reuses the app’s existing domain connection instead of re-authenticating with a stripped-down method that dropped the domain controller and LDAPS settings. This fixes “the user name or password is incorrect” errors when browsing in multi-DC or LDAPS environments.
